spec.name: Unified Payment Interface — API Technology Specifications
spec.description: NPCI UPI 2.0 complete API specification covering Pay, Collect, Balance Enquiry, Mandate, Refund, OTP, and MPIN management APIs across PSP, Bank, and NPCI interactions.

api_endpoints.name: ReqPay
api_endpoints.description: Initiate a UPI payment transaction. Sent by Payer PSP to NPCI to start the payment flow. Supports both direct pay (push) and collect (pull) payment types.

response_schema.authCode: string — bank auth code on success

api_endpoints.name: RespPay
api_endpoints.description: Response to ReqPay sent by NPCI back to PSP after processing payment through payer and payee bank systems.

api_endpoints.name: ReqAuthDetails
api_endpoints.description: Sent by NPCI to Payer Bank to authenticate payer credentials (MPIN/Biometric) and debit the payer account.

api_endpoints.name: RespAuthDetails
api_endpoints.description: Bank's response to NPCI after authentication and debit. Contains auth code confirming successful debit.

api_endpoints.name: ReqBalEnq
api_endpoints.description: Balance Enquiry request sent by PSP to NPCI, then routed to bank. Allows customer to check account balance using UPI PIN.

api_endpoints.name: ReqListAccount
api_endpoints.description: Request to list all bank accounts linked to a mobile number / VPA. Used during VPA registration and account linking.

response_schema.accounts: array of {accountNo, ifsc, bankName, acType, maskedName, isMobileBanking}

api_endpoints.name: ReqRegMob
api_endpoints.description: Register a mobile number with UPI ecosystem. Initiates OTP-based verification for mobile banking registration.

api_endpoints.name: ReqSetCre
api_endpoints.description: Set credential (MPIN) request. Used during initial MPIN setup or MPIN change. Encrypted with bank's public key.
api_endpoints.auth_method: OTP (for MPIN set) / Old MPIN (for change)

request_schema.atmLastDigits: string(6) — last 6 digits of debit card

api_endpoints.name: ReqChkTxn
api_endpoints.description: Check transaction status for a previously initiated transaction. Used for pending/timeout scenarios to determine final status.

api_endpoints.name: ReqValAdd
api_endpoints.description: Validate VPA (Virtual Payment Address). Checks if a VPA exists and returns masked beneficiary name. Used before initiating collect or pay.

api_endpoints.name: ReqCollect
api_endpoints.description: Collect (pull) payment request initiated by payee PSP. Merchant or payee requests money from payer. Payer must approve the collect request.

api_endpoints.name: ReqMandate
api_endpoints.description: Create a UPI AutoPay mandate for recurring payments. Allows merchant to collect recurring payments with customer's one-time approval.

api_endpoints.name: ReqMandateConfirmation
api_endpoints.description: Mandate execution confirmation for AutoPay debit. Notifies payer of upcoming debit under an existing mandate.

api_endpoints.name: ReqOtp
api_endpoints.description: Request OTP generation for mobile verification, Aadhaar mapping, or pre-login authentication.

api_endpoints.name: ReqHbt
api_endpoints.description: Heartbeat message. PSP periodically sends heartbeat to NPCI to indicate system availability and session liveness.

api_endpoints.name: ReqRefund
api_endpoints.description: Initiate a refund for a previously successful UPI payment. Reverses fund from payee to payer account.

api_endpoints.name: ReqMapAadhaar
api_endpoints.description: Link Aadhaar number to UPI VPA for identity verification. Used for UPI Lite and high-value transaction authentication.

api_endpoints.name: ReqTxnConfirmation
api_endpoints.description: Transaction confirmation notification sent to payer and payee after successful fund transfer.

flows.name: UPI Direct Pay (P2P)
flows.description: Person-to-person direct payment initiated by payer. Payer enters payee VPA, amount, authenticates with MPIN/Biometric.
flows.mermaid_diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Customer
  participant PP as Payer PSP
  participant N as NPCI
  participant PB as Payer Bank
  participant YP as Payee PSP
  participant YB as Payee Bank
  C->>PP: Enter VPA + Amount
  PP->>N: ReqValAdd
  N->>YP: Validate VPA
  YP-->>N: Valid + Masked Name
  N-->>PP: RespValAdd
  C->>PP: Enter MPIN
  PP->>N: ReqPay
  N->>PB: ReqAuthDetails
  PB-->>N: RespAuthDetails (Debit OK)
  N->>YB: ReqCredit
  YB-->>N: RespCredit
  N-->>PP: RespPay (Success)
  N->>YP: ReqTxnConfirmation

flows.name: UPI Collect Pay (P2M)
flows.description: Merchant-initiated pull payment. Merchant sends collect request to customer who must approve and authenticate.
flows.mermaid_diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant M as Merchant
  participant YP as Payee PSP
  participant N as NPCI
  participant PP as Payer PSP
  participant C as Customer
  participant PB as Payer Bank
  participant YB as Payee Bank
  M->>YP: Initiate Collect
  YP->>N: ReqCollect
  N->>PP: Collect Notification
  PP->>C: Push Notification
  C->>PP: Approve + MPIN
  PP->>N: ReqPay
  N->>PB: ReqAuthDetails
  PB-->>N: Debit OK
  N->>YB: ReqCredit
  N-->>YP: RespCollect (Success)

flows.name: UPI Balance Enquiry
flows.description: Customer checks account balance linked to VPA using MPIN authentication.
flows.mermaid_diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Customer
  participant PP as Payer PSP
  participant N as NPCI
  participant PB as Payer Bank
  C->>PP: Request Balance
  C->>PP: Enter MPIN
  PP->>N: ReqBalEnq (BAL)
  N->>PB: Route BalEnq
  PB-->>N: RespBalEnq (Balance)
  N-->>PP: Balance Response
  PP->>C: Show Balance

flows.name: UPI AutoPay Mandate Creation
flows.description: Customer creates a recurring payment mandate (AutoPay) for subscription or SIP payments.
flows.mermaid_diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant M as Merchant
  participant YP as Payee PSP
  participant N as NPCI
  participant PP as Payer PSP
  participant C as Customer
  participant PB as Payer Bank
  M->>YP: Create Mandate
  YP->>N: ReqMandate
  N->>PP: Approval Request
  PP->>C: Show Mandate Details
  C->>PP: Approve + MPIN
  PP->>N: Confirm
  N->>PB: Register Mandate
  N-->>YP: RespMandate (UMN)

flows.name: MPIN Setup (New Customer)
flows.description: New customer sets up MPIN during first-time UPI registration using debit card details and OTP.

steps.action: Select account and enter debit card last 6 digits + expiry

flows.mermaid_diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Customer
  participant PSP
  participant N as NPCI
  participant B as Bank
  C->>PSP: Card details
  PSP->>N: ReqOtp
  N->>B: Route OTP
  B->>C: SMS OTP
  C->>PSP: OTP + New MPIN
  PSP->>N: ReqSetCre
  N->>B: Validate + Store
  B-->>N: OK
  N-->>PSP: RespSetCre

dependencies.description: Pay flow requires prior VPA validation
NPCI calls bank for auth after ReqPay
Mandate execution uses ReqPay for debit
MPIN setup requires prior OTP verification
Refund checks original transaction status first
Balance enquiry routes to bank auth

security_findings.title: MPIN must be encrypted with bank public key
security_findings.description: Credentials (MPIN/Biometric) in creds.data must be encrypted using the bank's RSA public key. Plain text transmission is a critical security violation.
security_findings.recommendation: Implement RSA-2048 or ECC encryption for all credential data before transmission. Rotate bank public keys periodically.

security_findings.title: HMAC-SHA256 required for all credential blocks
security_findings.description: creds.hmac must contain HMAC-SHA256 of the credential data. Missing or invalid HMAC allows credential tampering.
security_findings.recommendation: Always compute and validate HMAC-SHA256 using the shared symmetric key. Reject requests with missing or invalid HMAC.

security_findings.title: All API calls must use TLS 1.2+
security_findings.description: UPI APIs must be transmitted over TLS 1.2 or higher. TLS 1.0/1.1 are deprecated and vulnerable.
security_findings.recommendation: Enforce TLS 1.2+ at the load balancer level. Disable older TLS versions and weak cipher suites.

security_findings.title: Aadhaar numbers must be encrypted at rest and in transit
security_findings.description: ReqMapAadhaar transmits Aadhaar numbers which are sensitive PII under PDPA. Unencrypted Aadhaar storage is a regulatory violation.
security_findings.recommendation: Encrypt Aadhaar at rest using AES-256. Mask Aadhaar in logs (show only last 4 digits). Comply with UIDAI data storage norms.

security_findings.title: Duplicate transaction IDs must be rejected
security_findings.description: txnId must be unique per session. Duplicate txnId can enable replay attacks or double debits.
security_findings.recommendation: Implement idempotency check using txnId + orgId combination. Cache processed txnIds for at least 24 hours.

security_findings.title: No rate limiting specified for authentication APIs
security_findings.description: ReqAuthDetails and ReqSetCre lack explicit rate limiting guidance. Brute force MPIN attacks are possible.
security_findings.recommendation: Implement exponential backoff after 3 failed auth attempts. Lock account after 5 failures. Alert on suspicious patterns.

security_findings.title: Geocode field not validated for plausibility
security_findings.description: device.geocode accepts any lat,long string without validation. Falsified geocodes can bypass location-based fraud controls.
security_findings.recommendation: Validate geocode format (valid lat -90 to 90, long -180 to 180). Implement velocity checks on location changes.

security_findings.title: ReqHbt lacks authentication
security_findings.description: Heartbeat API (ReqHbt) has no authentication mechanism, allowing spoofed heartbeats from unauthorized systems.
security_findings.recommendation: Add mutual TLS (mTLS) for heartbeat endpoint. Validate PSP certificate on NPCI side.
